prestazioni: Engine: B48C20A (2.0L turbocharged inline-4) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 30+ psi boost capability. Precision Turbo & Engine PT6766 CEA turbocharger (67mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and custom 3.5" V-band downpipe.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1700x direct-port injectors paired with a Radium Engineering dual-pump fuel surge tank (2x Walbro 450 LPH pumps) and a Syvecs S8 ECU with flex-fuel ethanol mapping for E85 compatibility. Upgraded high-pressure fuel pump (Bosch CP4.2) with a custom billet fuel rail.

Drivetrain & Handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way) with custom 3.72:1 final drive ratio. KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers with remote reservoirs and adjustable camber plates. AP Racing 6-piston front (355mm) and 4-piston rear (330mm) big brake kit with two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads. Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35R20 front, 285/30R20 rear) on BBS FI-R 9.5x20" and 10.5x20" forged wheels.
estetica: Aero: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Countryman JCW-specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders. Custom 3D-printed active rear wing with Gurney flap (adjustable via hydraulic actuators).

Exterior: Full Respray in BMW Individual Frozen Deep Green (668) with PPF (XPEL Ultimate Plus) and ceramic coating (Gyeon Quartz). Custom laser-etched JCW badges (replacing OEM) with carbon fiber backing. Retro-inspired Union Jack LED taillights (Lux H8 V4) and sequential turn signals.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (Ragazzon) including dashboard, door cards, and headliner. Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage (Autopower) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). MOTEC C127 dash logger with AIM PDM30 power distribution module.
